fields.helpText: This file/field is used to display to the user information regarding the reason batching or transmission of code sheets is locked.   The syntax of the field entry is 'station number'- 'code sheet system identifier (3 character)'- (either BATCH or TRANSMIT).
This field is used to store the user which currently has the batching or transmission locked.
This field is used to store the date and time the batching or transmission was locked.
